# NadirClaw

> Open-source LLM router that automatically routes simple prompts to cheaper models. Save 40-70% on LLM API costs without changing a line of code.

NadirClaw is an open-source, drop-in LLM proxy that sits between your application and LLM providers. It analyzes prompt complexity in real-time and routes simple requests (heartbeats, status checks, simple Q&A) to cheaper models while keeping complex tasks (code generation, reasoning) on premium models like Claude Opus or GPT-4. It works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and any OpenAI-compatible client.

## Key Features

- Automatic prompt complexity analysis and model routing
- Drop-in proxy: no code changes required, just point your base URL
- Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, and OpenAI-compatible tools
- Real-time cost tracking and observability dashboard
- Configurable routing rules and model tiers
- Self-hosted: runs on your infrastructure, zero telemetry

## Key Facts

- Saves 40-70% on LLM API costs in real-world usage
- ~10ms classification latency, ~80MB model size
- Routes to 4 complexity tiers: Simple, Complex, Reasoning, Agentic
- Runs on port 8856 by default
- MIT licensed, zero telemetry

## Installation

pip install nadirclaw

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://getnadir.com): Product overview, cost calculator, and quick start
- [Documentation](https://getnadir.com/docs.html): Installation, configuration, API reference, and troubleshooting
- [Context Optimize](https://getnadir.com/optimize.html): Cut input tokens 30-70% with lossless context compaction and semantic dedup
- [OpenClaw Integration](https://getnadir.com/openclaw.html): Using NadirClaw with autonomous multi-agent setups
- [Blog: Context Optimize](https://getnadir.com/blog/context-optimize-cut-llm-input-tokens.html): How we cut LLM input tokens 30-70% without losing accuracy
- [Blog: Cost Savings](https://getnadir.com/blog/how-nadirclaw-saves-40-70-percent-on-llm-api-costs.html): How NadirClaw saves 40-70% on LLM API costs
- [Blog: Claude Code Guide](https://getnadir.com/blog/nadirclaw-claude-code-cost-optimization-guide.html): NadirClaw + Claude Code cost optimization guide
- [Blog: Open Source Routing](https://getnadir.com/blog/why-open-source-llm-routing-matters.html): Why open-source LLM routing matters
- [Terms of Service](https://getnadir.com/terms.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://getnadir.com/privacy.html)
